title: Delicate Dutch Tomato Frittata
description: A low-calorie, umami-rich Dutch dish featuring tinned tomatoes and a deglaze fond, perfect for a springy brunch mood. This frittata is made with fresh ingredients and a delicate touch.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the tinned tomatoes, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt.
Pour the egg mixture over the tomato mixture in the skillet.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Use a spatula to carefully loosen the edges of the frittata from the skillet.
Slide the frittata onto a plate and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
